title: The Discovery
summary: Sin, a research scientist at an unnamed bio-research lab, synthesises the first successful batch of what she will later name the Apotheosis Serum. She administers it to herself, transforming into a 12ft giantess.

title: SinCorp Founded
summary: Working in the shadows, Sin manoeuvres herself into control of the bio-research lab and restructures it under her own name. SinCorp begins quietly mass-producing the Apotheosis Serum and planning its global release.

title: TDay — Transformation Day
summary: Sin triggers the planned cataclysm. The Apotheosis Serum is released into the world simultaneously through water supplies, airborne dispersal, and SinCorp's global distribution network. Women across the world begin transforming — growing, changing, and losing their empathy. The old world collapses within weeks.

title: Rise of the Mega-Cities
summary: The first mega-cities begin to take shape as the Transformed consolidate power. Enormous infrastructure is constructed to accommodate giantess-scale inhabitants. Angora, under Sin's direct rule, emerges as the most powerful of these new city-states.

title: The Wilds Claimed
summary: The land between mega-cities — now called the Wilds — is formally abandoned by the new matriarchal governments. Male survivors who refused to submit to the cities scatter into this reclaimed wilderness, becoming known as Wild Toys. Macro-level women, too large to live in the cities, begin staking territories in the Wilds.

title: The Resistance Organises
summary: The first known Resistance cell forms — a loose coalition of empathy-retaining women and rescued toys working to smuggle males out of the mega-cities. Structured around self-contained guerilla cells with no central leadership, the Resistance operates in secret across multiple cities.

title: Project Sylph
summary: Details classified. A SinCorp initiative operating in the present day of the Sinverse timeline.
